children.value: This chapter focused on a key calculation in bond pricing:
. Several new functions were developed and deployed. Although introduced to illustrate the calculation of accrued interest, they are destined for heavy lifting in future chapters. The
was identified as a major advantage of Python's abundant libraries and modules. This principle is a highlight of our approach and a key feature for effective learning.
